mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ai_config ORDER BY id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ai_config (config_key, config_value, description) VALUES (#{configKey}, #{configValue}, #{description}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE config_value = #{configValue}, update_time = NOW()

INSERT INTO ai_config (config_key, config_value, description) VALUES
(#{item.configKey}, #{item.configValue}, #{item.description})
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE config_value = VALUES(config_value), update_time = NOW()
